context: Checks whether the final artifact follows the refactor-code instructions from the published Rails Agent Skills tile.

checklist.name: instruction-1
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Use this skill when the task is to change structure without changing intended behavior.

checklist.name: instruction-2
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Prefer adapters, facades, or wrappers for transitional states.

checklist.name: instruction-3
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT:** Run verification after every refactoring step.

checklist.name: instruction-4
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: **Write this before touching any production file.** This is not optional — no refactoring step begins until this test exists and passes on the current (un-refactored) code.

checklist.name: instruction-5
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: Run it: `bundle exec rspec spec/requests/orders_spec.rb` — it must pass on the **current** code before any refactoring begins. If it fails, stop and fix the test or the existing code first.

checklist.name: instruction-6
checklist.description: The submitted artifact follows this skill instruction: State the stable behavior that must not change.
